# Task 2 ŌĆö `gen-docs.ts` CLI + auto-generated docs for Phase 1 primitives

> **Status: TODO**

## Goal

Build the `gen-docs.ts` generator that ┬¦22.10 point 8 requires
(deferred from Phase 1) and generate `docs/primitives/ta/<id>.md`
pages for every Phase-1 primitive in the same PR. Each subsequent
Phase-2 port re-runs this generator and commits the resulting
page; this task is the gate's enabling step.

## Prerequisites

- Task 1 (PlotKind expansion landed ŌĆö the generator surfaces every
  `PlotKind` in the generated page's "renders to" section).

## Current Behavior

Phase 1 ships JSDoc on every `ta.*` primitive with `@formula`,
`@warmup`, `@since`, `@example`, stability marker. No generator
consumes it. `docs/primitives/ta/` is empty. The PLAN ┬¦22.10 gate
"auto-generated docs page" is unenforced.

## Desired Behavior

- New `packages/cli/src/commands/genDocs.ts` walks
  `packages/runtime/src/ta/*.ts` (excluding `_lib`, `lib`, tests,
  benches, the registry, the barrel), parses each export's JSDoc
  via the TS compiler API (`getJsDocCommentsAndTags`), and writes
  one `docs/primitives/ta/<id>.md` per primitive.
- New `chartlang docs` subcommand wraps the generator (called from
  `packages/cli/src/commands/docs.ts`). Idempotent ŌĆö re-running on
  a clean tree changes nothing.
- New root script `pnpm docs:generate` invokes the CLI subcommand.
- New gate `pnpm docs:gate` (run from CI) re-runs the generator
  into a tmp dir, compares output against committed files, and
  fails on diff. Same posture as `pnpm readme:check` (Phase 0).
- Phase-1 primitives' pages (`docs/primitives/ta/sma.md` etc.)
  land in this PR.

## Requirements

### 1. `packages/cli/src/commands/genDocs.ts`

The generator ŌĆö placed under `commands/` per the CLI invariant
(`packages/cli/CLAUDE.md`: "all logic lives in `index.ts` /
`commands/`"). Imported by `commands/docs.ts`. Inputs: a
directory glob (default `packages/runtime/src/ta/*.ts`, excluding
`_lib`, `lib`, tests, benches, the registry, the barrel
`index.ts`). Output: `docs/primitives/ta/<id>.md` per file.

The generator uses the TS compiler API (`ts.createProgram` ŌåÆ
`ts.getJSDocTags`) ŌĆö no regex parsing. Phase 1's
`scripts/docs-check.ts` already depends on `typescript`; reuse it.

Each generated page follows the ┬¦17.4 template:

```markdown
# `ta.<id>`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.1
> **Status:** <maturity tag from JSDoc>

## Formula

<from @formula tag>

## Warmup

<from @warmup tag ŌĆö N bars NaN until ŌĆ”>

## Anchors

<from @anchors tag, omitted when absent>

## Signature

```ts
<from TS signature, re-emitted via printer>
```

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|

<table ŌĆö entries derived from JSDoc @param tags>

## Returns

<from @returns or from TS return type via printer>

## Example

```ts
<from @example block ŌĆö verbatim>
```

## See also

- [Source on GitHub](<github URL ŌĆö derived from package.json
  `repository.url` + `repository.directory` + relative path>)
- [Reference math](../../PLAN.md#92-full-primitive-list)
```

Pages match a stable header (with `<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by
chartlang docs ŌĆö do not edit by hand -->` as the first line) so
the `pnpm docs:gate` byte-equality compare is robust.

### 2. `packages/cli/src/commands/docs.ts`

```ts
export function docsCommand(args: ReadonlyArray<string>): Promise<void>;
```

Parses `--out <dir>` (default `docs/primitives/ta/`) and
`--source <dir>` (default `packages/runtime/src/ta/`). Calls the
generator; logs per-file write status; exits 0 on success.

### 3. `packages/cli/src/bin.ts`

Add `docs` to the subcommand dispatch alongside `compile` and
`scaffold-adapter` from Phase 1.

### 4. Root scripts

```json
"docs:generate": "pnpm chartlang docs",
"docs:gate":     "pnpm tsx scripts/docs-gate.ts"
```

(The existing `chartlang` root script is `tsx packages/cli/src/bin.ts`
per `package.json`.)

`scripts/docs-gate.ts` runs the generator into a tmp dir then
diffs against `docs/primitives/ta/` ŌĆö fails on any drift.

### 5. CI workflow update

`.github/workflows/ci.yml` adds a step running `pnpm docs:gate`
after `pnpm docs:check`. The two gates are independent:

- `docs:check` ŌĆö Phase 1 ŌĆö executes `@example` blocks through the
  compiler.
- `docs:gate` ŌĆö this task ŌĆö confirms `docs/primitives/ta/*.md` is
  in sync with the JSDoc.

### 6. Generated pages for Phase 1 primitives

Run `pnpm docs:generate` and commit the resulting 9 files:

- `docs/primitives/ta/sma.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/ema.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/stdev.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/bb.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/rsi.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/macd.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/atr.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/crossover.md`
- `docs/primitives/ta/crossunder.md`

If any Phase-1 primitive's JSDoc is missing a required tag, fix
the JSDoc in this PR (do not relax the template).

### 7. Tests

- `packages/cli/src/commands/genDocs.test.ts` ŌĆö unit tests:
  - Parses a minimal in-memory JSDoc payload and emits the
    expected markdown.
  - Rejects a primitive missing required tags (`@formula`,
    `@warmup`, `@since`, `@example`) with a structured error code.
  - Idempotent ŌĆö running twice on the same input yields the same
    output.
  - Skips non-primitive files (`lib/`, `*.test.ts`, `*.bench.ts`,
    `registry.ts`, `index.ts`).
- `packages/cli/src/commands/docs.test.ts` ŌĆö integration: runs the
  command end-to-end against a tmp dir, asserts files written +
  exit code.
- `scripts/docs-gate.test.ts` ŌĆö runs the gate against the real
  `docs/primitives/ta/` tree; succeeds (the in-tree files are
  fresh).

### 8. README update

`README.md` (root) gains a "Generated docs" section linking to
`docs/primitives/ta/index.md` (a static index that lists every
primitive ŌĆö written by hand in this task; future ports update it
through the generator if ┬¦17.4 evolves to track an index, or by
hand per port).

`packages/cli/README.md` adds the `docs` subcommand to the public
surface list ŌĆö stays under the ┬¦17.1 100-line cap.

### 9. JSDoc

Every new export in `packages/cli/src/commands/genDocs.ts` and
`commands/docs.ts` carries `@since 0.2`, `@experimental`, one
`@example`.

### 10. Coverage

`packages/cli` stays at 100%. The generator's branch matrix
(missing-tag rejections, file-not-found, etc.) is covered by the
unit tests; the in-tree happy path is covered by the integration
test.

## Files to Create / Modify

| File | Action | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `packages/cli/src/commands/genDocs.ts` | Create | The generator (private helper for `docs.ts`). |
| `packages/cli/src/commands/genDocs.test.ts` | Create | Generator unit tests. |
| `packages/cli/src/commands/docs.ts` | Create | `chartlang docs` subcommand (delegates to `genDocs.ts`). |
| `packages/cli/src/commands/docs.test.ts` | Create | Subcommand integration tests. |
| `packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts` | Modify | Re-export. |
| `packages/cli/src/bin.ts` | Modify | Wire `docs` into the dispatch. |
| `packages/cli/README.md` | Modify | Add `docs` to public surface. |
| `scripts/docs-gate.ts` | Create | CI gate (generator diff). |
| `scripts/docs-gate.test.ts` | Create | Gate self-test. |
| `package.json` (root) | Modify | Add `docs:generate`, `docs:gate` scripts. |
| `.github/workflows/ci.yml` | Modify | Add `pnpm docs:gate` step. |
| `docs/primitives/ta/<id>.md` | Create (├Ś9) | Phase-1 primitives' generated pages. |
| `docs/primitives/ta/index.md` | Create | Hand-written index. |
| `README.md` (root) | Modify | Link to generated docs. |

## Gates

- `pnpm typecheck`
- `pnpm lint`
- `pnpm test` (100% coverage)
- `pnpm docs:check`
- `pnpm docs:gate` (newly added)
- `pnpm readme:check`
- `pnpm conformance`

## Changeset

`.changeset/phase-2-gen-docs.md` ŌĆö `minor` for
`@invinite-org/chartlang-cli`. No public-API change in the other
packages this task touches (root scripts / CI workflow are infra,
docs files are infra).

## Acceptance Criteria

- `chartlang docs` runs end-to-end and writes the 9 Phase-1 pages.
- `pnpm docs:gate` succeeds on a clean tree, fails on any
  hand-edit to a generated page.
- CI runs the new step; PR-time green.
- Every Phase-1 primitive's `docs/primitives/ta/<id>.md` exists,
  matches the ┬¦17.4 template, opens with the
  `<!-- AUTO-GENERATED -->` sentinel.
- `pnpm test` passes with 100% coverage on `@invinite-org/chartlang-cli`.
- README + readme gates green.
- Changeset committed.
